description: Use this API to set the extended bus name input format to either the PSSE-29 or PSSE-30 format. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = rev29_names(ival)

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Extended bus name option flag. (input; 0 by default).

ival.description: PSSE-30 format (12 characters plus base voltage).
PSSE-29 or earlier format (8 characters plus base voltage).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
